figures.caption: Table 1: Class priors (%) per split (Class 0 = negative/normal, Class 1 = positive/event). These priors inform validation-tuned thresholding and help interpret AUC vs. macro-F1 behavior.

Figure 1: Architecture overview. Depthwise (blue), PW1 kept in INT8 (green), synthesized PW layers (orange), classifier head (purple). The shared generator (red) produces PW2:L once at load time and caches them (gray); steady-state inference uses standard integer kernels.
Figure 3: Pareto fronts: macro-F1 vs. packed flash.. Markers are color/shape-coded by model; the dotted curve traces the nondominated frontier; the dashed vertical line marks the ∼225 kB elbow.
